channel.title: syntax on ERu's site
channel.description: Recent content in syntax on ERu's site

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme. Headings The following HTML —elements represent six levels of section headings. is the highest section level while is the lowest. H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6
